content.en:
"Ye Tian, let's reconcile!"

Tumen Dao ancestral voice.

He didn't want to fight Ye Tian, otherwise his incarnation would definitely be finished.

His strength is not strong, once this incarnation falls, if he wants to condense the next incarnation and enter the quasi-Dao realm again, I am afraid it will be a long time later, and at that time, the opportunities of the battlefield relics are estimated to have been developed.

This is not the result he wanted!

Therefore, he did not want this avatar to perish.

However, Ye Tian ignored the Tumen Dao Ancestor at all and vowed to kill the Tumen Dao Ancestor incarnation.

Seeing that Ye Tian's offensive was unabated, Tumen Dao Ancestor was completely panicked.

"Ye Tian, you have to know that this is just an incarnation of me, do you really want to offend a Dao Ancestor?" said Tumen Dao Ancestor coldly.

"Tumen Dao Ancestor, if you have the guts, then the real body will come, see if I am afraid of you?"

Ye Tian put down his cruel words.

"You ......"

Tumen Daozu was angry.

If he can come in a real body, he still needs to talk nonsense with Ye Tian?

After a while, the incarnation of the Tumen Dao Ancestor was completely shattered, and the only remaining soul consciousness was completely dissipated, and there was no way to even leave the quasi-Dao realm and return to the body.

Of course, the power of Dao Ancestor is beyond the imagination of ordinary people, even if the soul consciousness of the incarnation cannot be returned, Dao Ancestor can also know who the incarnation died at.

In other words, the Tumen Dao Ancestor must have known that the incarnation died at Ye Tian's hands.

Outside the boundary.

Tumen Dao Ancestor's tightly closed eyes opened suddenly, his face showed anger, and he roared angrily: "Ye Tian!!"

His incarnation was destroyed, which was too much loss for him, not only did he collect countless treasures and lose chance for so long, but he also lost the qualification to compete for the opportunity of the battlefield relics.

Right now, he didn't dare to condense the incarnation to descend on the battlefield ruins at all, otherwise his body would be seriously injured.

At this time, he didn't dare to let his body be severely damaged, otherwise it would be easy to fall.

"Damn, I can only give up the battlefield relics! The domain boundary fragments are very large, and the battlefield relics are only one of the relics, I still have a chance!" Tumen Dao Ancestor thought to himself.

......

"Wow, Tumen Dao Ancestor's net worth is too rich!"

Ye Tian took a storage Dao weapon that the Tumen Dao Ancestor carried with him, and checked the countless treasures inside, and was immediately shocked.

When the incarnation of the Tumen Dao Ancestor came, it must have been very barren, but in a short period of time, he had collected so many treasures and resources, and there were dozens of Dao weapons alone!

In addition, there are many inheritance classics and secret arts, and even Taoist inheritances have more than a dozen.

It is conceivable how rich Tumen Daozu's net worth is.

Ye Tian got all the treasures of the Tumen Dao Ancestor, and his net worth can be said to have skyrocketed.

"Close!"

Ye Tian received the ownerless Void Lock, although this kind of Dao weapon could not be used now, but when he stepped into the ranks of the True Ancestor, he could use such a Dao weapon.

This kind of Dao weapon is very useful, and the value is much higher than that of ordinary Dao weapons.

Even a Dao Ancestor may not have such a Void Blockade Dao Weapon.

Before, the Tumen Dao Ancestor sealed the void, which also attracted the attention of some Dao Ancestors, but these Dao Ancestor incarnations were busy with their own opportunities, so they didn't come to check.

But now, the Void Blockade was lifted, and the aura of the Tumen Dao Ancestor dissipated, but Ye Tian appeared here, which immediately made the other Dao Ancestor incarnations change color.

"The Tumen Dao Ancestor incarnation has dissipated?"

"Impossible, Ye Tian is just a true monarch, how can he kill the incarnation of the Tumen Dao Ancestor?"

"That's the case, just now it should have been the Tumen Dao Ancestor who used the Void Blockade Dao weapon, but I didn't expect the incarnation of the Tumen Dao Ancestor to be defeated. "

"This disciple of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor is too strong to be able to defeat a Dao Ancestor incarnation!"

Some Dao Ancestor incarnations really wanted to kill Ye Tian and seize the treasures on Ye Tian's body, after all, Ye Tian killed the incarnation of the Tumen Dao Ancestor, and the resource treasures plundered by the incarnation of the Tumen Dao Ancestor must be on Ye Tian's body, once Ye Tian is killed, the harvest will be relatively large.

But Ye Tian was able to kill the incarnation of the Dao Ancestor of the Tumen, which was enough to prove that Ye Tian was even more difficult to deal with than the incarnation of the Dao Ancestor, and it was not cost-effective to deal with Ye Tian, maybe he would fall.

Therefore, none of the Dao Ancestor incarnations did anything to Ye Tian.

Anyway, there are a lot of opportunities here, so there is no need to provoke Ye Tian.

After Ye Tian killed the incarnation of the Tumen Dao Ancestor, he did not leave here, the ruins of the Heaven Splitting Sect are also a real place of great opportunity, and a little benefit here is enough for a true monarch to gain unlimited benefits.

For example, this big array in front of you.

"This is the Enlightenment Monument!"

Ye Tian also saw the Enlightenment Monument inside the Great Array, but immediately frowned.

The level of this large array was too high, he couldn't understand it at all, and he couldn't analyze it at all.

"It's a pity that it's too early to kill the Tumen Dao Ancestor, if I wait for the Tumen Dao Ancestor to finish analyzing this big array, and wait for him to break the formation before making a move, I can get this top-notch enlightenment monument. Ye Tian sighed.

However, even if he knew, he couldn't wait, and he would still take action immediately.

The ruins of the Heaven Splitting Sect have been discovered for a long time, and the areas that have not been shrouded by the Great Array have basically been explored, and the really good places are shrouded in the Great Array, only those Dao Ancestor incarnations have hope of cracking the Great Array, and Ye Tian is just a True Monarch, and his knowledge and understanding of the formation and the Great Dao are far inferior to the Dao Ancestors, so he can't crack the Great Array at all.

Ye Tian waited for a few days, and after realizing that he couldn't get the benefits, he thought about leaving here.

But at this moment, a large array in the central area of the Heaven Splitting Sect Ruins was broken, and suddenly a Heaven-shattering Divine Pillar appeared on the earth, and immediately a divine light radiated this area of the earth.

"This is the Sky Splitting Pillar!"

Ye Tian's pupils shrank and exclaimed.

According to the information he knew, the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar was one of the three great treasures of the Heaven Splitting Sect, and its value was unknown how many times that surpassed the Dao Weapon, and for a force, it was a real strategic treasure.

It can be said that the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar is too important to a force, and it can completely create a true Triple Heaven Force.

None of them.

Just because the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar has three major abilities, one is to create a special area space, people can enter it, enjoy the suppression of the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar all the time, and be able to refine the body and soul under the suppression, this effect alone is enough for countless disciples to quickly improve the strength of the physical body and the strength of the divine soul.

The second ability is the inscription, as long as it can withstand the power of the Splitting Pillar, you can engrave the Splitting Pillar pattern on its body, and when you fight, you can summon the Phantom of the Splitting Pillar to suppress the enemy.

It was precisely because of the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar that the disciples of the Heaven Splitting Sect did not know how many geniuses of the same level had been suppressed when they were roaming in the outside world.

The third ability is the true ability of the Sky Splitting God Pillar, and it is also one of the hole cards of the Sky Splitting Sect, this secret is almost unknown to many forces, and Black Wind Mountain knows this ability.

This ability is to assist the True Ancestor to join the Dao, and the effect is similar to that of the Ancestral Monument, but it is not as strong as the Ancestral Monument.

According to Mi Xin, the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar can help the six True Ancestors merge with each other, but once they merge with each other, it is equivalent to being restricted by the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar.

And the Splitting Heaven Pillar is different from the Ancestral Monument, the Ancestral Monument cannot be refined, it belongs to the Chaos Heaven and Earth, and no one can control the Ancestral Monument, but the Splitting Heaven Pillar is only a weapon, so it can be refined and controlled.

Therefore, refining the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar is equivalent to controlling the six Dao Ancestors.

From this, we can see how high the value of the Sky Splitting Pillar is.

Any force that obtains the Heaven Splitting Pillar can develop its power into a Triple Heaven Force.

Seeing the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar, Ye Tian clenched his hands, and a thought arose in his heart - to seize the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar!
